coverage.criterion: Docker Compose starts flow-finance-ai, firefly-iii, and grafana (minimal profile) without embedded PostgreSQL
coverage.notes: T-0001 minimal profile; T-0011 Grafana datasource/dashboard provisioning

coverage.criterion: External PostgreSQL connection configurable via TOML/env with database.mode = external
coverage.notes: Config module enforces external mode; env overlay documented

coverage.criterion: Rust backend serves health endpoint and authenticated API skeleton
React UI shell loads with OIDC auth flow wired (login redirect + session)
Firefly Connector syncs accounts, transactions, categories, budgets, tags, and piggy banks via /api/v1
coverage.notes: Mirror schema (T-0005), GET connector (T-0006), Sync Status UI (T-0010)

coverage.criterion: Sync scheduler runs on configurable interval; manual sync trigger available
coverage.notes: Scheduler/API (T-0007), sync_runs schema (T-0005), manual trigger in UI (T-0010)

coverage.criterion: No write operations issued to Firefly III API (read-only verified in integration test or audit log)
coverage.notes: GET-only client + audit (T-0006); integration test assertion (T-0012)

coverage.criterion: Dev environment can connect to running local Firefly III instance per operator setup

summary.tasks_without_acceptance_ref_note: T-0011 supports AC-1 Grafana acceptance via datasource provisioning; mapped in AC-1 notes
